To the right of the map: a neat stack of crisp paper printouts, neatly tabbed, the top page rubber-stamped 'COMPLETE' in dark red ink with today's date written underneath in pen. The ceramic mug of black coffee is still half-full and a faint thin curl of steam rises from it - the operator left moments ago. The fountain pen lies still across the map at a precise angle. The closed matte-black laptop sits silent.
